market_pulse: Memorial Day weekend dominance active: Encore and OMNIA dayclubs command top-tier talent (Calvin Harris, Chris Lake, Tiësto); Zouk/OMNIA night leads with RL Grime & talent drops; LIV maintaining strong EDC week momentum but facing stacked competitive weekend.

weekend_readiness.label: PEAK
factors: All major venues at full capacity & premium pricing
Top-tier international talent deployed (Calvin Harris, Tiësto, Chris Lake, RL Grime)
LIV EDC Week momentum carries into weekend
Competitor pricing and VIP packages aggressive
weekend_readiness.liv_recommendation: Activate premium bottle service + VIP early bird promotions by Sunday. Consider flash deal on limited cabanas. Monitor real-time guest sentiment across social—capitalize on any competitor bottlenecks or service failures.

content_gaps.description: Competitors (Encore, OMNIA, Zouk) posting real-time event countdown carousels and Stories. LIV posting static lineups.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Create 15-30s countdown Reels for Sunday/Monday events. Show real crowd energy, DJ booth setup, pre-party vibe. Post to IG Stories every 2-4 hours leading up to events.

content_gaps.description: Hakkasan/TAO posting influencer takeovers and behind-the-scenes guest photos. LIV has no visible influencer story content.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Partner with 3-5 micro-influencers (10K-100K followers) to post 2-3 Stories each on Sunday. Tag LIV, use location stickers, call out specific talent/experiences.

content_gaps.description: Competitors systematically reposting guest UGC showing outfits, group moments, drinks. LIV not actively curating/sharing guest content.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Create branded hashtag #LIVWeekendVibes or #LIVMemDay and encourage tagging. Repost top 3-5 posts daily to IG Stories/Feed. Offer 1-2 winners free entry next week.

content_gaps.description: Multiple venues posting DJ/artist teasers 48h before events (audio clips, hype reels). LIV posting final lineups but not pre-hype.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Post 15-20s audio/beat teaser clips from upcoming weekend performers by Sunday evening. Tag artists, ask followers to guess who/what remix, run quick poll.

influencer_activity.mention: Vegas pool season 2026 guide video tagged #livbeach; received 45K+ views; positioning LIV Beach as premiere dayclub for pool parties.
Performing at LIV Beach Club; fans creating UGC content about seeing him; strong organic reach with #johnsummit + #livbeach tags.
Tagged in LIV Nightclub EDC week announcement (5/14 performance); followers engaging with venue tag.
Cross-venue appearances: OMNIA Dayclub (5/23) + TAO Beach (upcoming); no current LIV booking visible; represents high-tier talent gap.

liv_outreach_targets.suggested_collab: Invite for LIV Beach or Nightclub weekend slot; highlight Vegas' multi-venue ecosystem

liv_outreach_targets.reason: House legend playing Palm Tree (5/22), OMNIA (5/22), likely other venues; massive reach; consider future LIV headliner
